summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in Colo and Power layers, with Maharashtra, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, and Gujarat as key state targets driven by policy incentives and infrastructure readiness. The top India policy hook is the UP Data Centre Policy 2026 targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment, alongside Gujarat’s Dholera/GIFT green AI-ready push. Value-chain movers are hyperscalers expanding Colo and Build capacity, led by Amazon’s $48 billion commitment. Foreign hyperscalers are actively scaling in India, with 13 players including Amazon, Google, Microsoft, and Meta advancing $70+ billion in combined announced investments.
